collocations: wear a wig; blonde wig; curly wig

definition: In contrast or comparison with the fact that; while on the contrary
example: My brother enjoys loud parties, whereas I prefer a quiet evening at home with a book.
collocations: whereas in the past; whereas in contrast; whereas previously

definition: all living things (except people) that are undomesticated
example: This research underscores the importance of integrating movement ecology and climatic variables for effective wildlife management and conservation planning.
collocations: protect wildlife; wildlife crime; local wildlife

definition: a large, uncultivated, and uninhabited area of land in its natural state; a wild and uninhabited region
example: The species has adapted to a remarkable range of habitats, from bustling cities to untouched areas of wilderness.
collocations: remote wilderness; wilderness areas; vast wilderness

definition: travel in a yacht
example: They sailed around the calm bay on a beautiful white yacht.
collocations: yacht along the coast; yacht to the island; yacht around the bay

definition: transparent screen (as of glass) to protect occupants of a vehicle
example: There are buses with specific routes and destinations, generally written on their windshields or shouted out by a barker riding in the front seat.
collocations: windshield wiper; cracked windshield; clean the windshield

definition: wither, as with a loss of moisture
example: As your brain begins to wither, your memories fade, your thinking slows down, and your risk of dementia increases.
collocations: wither away; wither and die; flowers wither

definition: the activity of worshipping
example: Our ability to access affordable daycare, housing, proximity to parks, freedom to worship, a culture that's obsessed with mood management is not likely going to be a very happy culture in the end.
collocations: hero worship; ancestor worship; place of worship

definition: small workplace where handcrafts or manufacturing are done
example: This text analyses the papers accepted for the workshop on the reuse of designs, an interdisciplinary cognitive approach.
collocations: attend a workshop; training workshop; hands-on workshop

definition: combining clever conception and facetious expression
example: Starting as a consulting company advising organizations on becoming more diverse, Witty Works first helped them write job ads using inclusive language.
collocations: witty remark; witty banter; witty comment

definition: having worth or merit or value; being honorable or admirable
example: Jainism views every Soul (Jainism) as worthy of respect because it has the potential to become (God in Jainism).
collocations: deem worthy; worthy opponent; scene worthy

definition: sufficiently valuable to justify the investment of time or interest
example: Simply put, excellence is involved engagement in something worthwhile that aligns with your values.
collocations: worthwhile cause; worthwhile investment; worthwhile experience

definition: to produce or provide something, such as a result, profit, or crop
example: The rich soil on the farm yields a large harvest every autumn.
collocations: yield a profit; yield results; yield a crop
